faq.What is Tums?: Tums is a Fabric Minecraft mod that simplifies Minecraft mod development by introducing a simple, user-friendly scripting language based on Tusan.
faq.How do I install Tums?: Download the latest version from Modrinth, drag the .jar file into your mods folder, and start Minecraft.
faq.What file extension do Tums scripts use?: Tums scripts use the .tsn extension and live in [YOUR MINECRAFT FOLDER]/tums/scripts/.
faq.Can I create my own syntax?: Yes. Tums is fully open source and ships with API support for adding custom syntax or building your own language on top of it.
